product_highlights: Capixyl™ — biomimetic peptide combined with red clover extract (biochanin A) for hair growth support
Lipid-based delivery systems that enhance penetration of actives into scalp and follicle
Anti-hair loss portfolio targeting DHT-mediated follicle atrophy and poor scalp microcirculation
Specialty actives addressing both cosmetic and dermo-cosmetic hair care needs
Clinical study support and regulatory documentation for key actives
notes: Lucas Meyer Cosmetics, part of Clariant, is a French cosmetic active ingredient specialist with a strong portfolio of hair and scalp care actives. As a key distributor of Capixyl™, they provide one of the most clinically validated hair growth actives on the market — a biomimetic peptide combined with red clover extract rich in biochanin A for comprehensive anti-hair loss support. Their lipid-based delivery systems are specifically engineered to enhance the penetration and efficacy of hair care actives deep into the scalp and hair follicle. A go-to partner for formulators seeking clinically-backed, COSMOS-certified anti-hair loss and scalp health solutions.
